metadata.summary: xv6-k210 has a simple syscall tracing mechanism (strace) via SYS_trace syscall and tmask field, but NO tracepoint/ftrace/perf infrastructure, NO ring buffer, NO structured trace events, NO trace event types/macros. Tracing is done via direct printf() in syscall dispatch path only.
